channel.title: InYourBones Daily Music News
channel.description: Top 5 daily music stories handpicked by InYourBones

item.title: Nia Archives Announces New Album Emotional Junglist: Hear “Boys In Blue”
item.description: 🎉 Dive into the jungle vibes with Nia Archives' new album Emotional Junglist! 🌿🎶 #NewMusicAlert

item.title: Craig Finn and Patterson Hood Announce Summer 2026 Co-Headlining Tour
item.description: 🎸 Summer 2026 just got hotter! Craig Finn and Patterson Hood are teaming up for an epic co-headlining tour! 🤘 #MusicNews #SummerTour

item.title: Foo Fighters playing Irving Plaza & Starland Ballroom on Thursday & Saturday
item.description: Rock out with Foo Fighters this week! 🎸🤘 Who's getting tickets? #FooFighters #LiveMusic

item.title: Yungblud to Kick Off Highly Anticipated Spring 2026 North American Tour
item.description: Yungblud is hitting the road 🎸🔥 Get ready to rock out with him on his North American tour! #YungbludTour2026

item.title: Hayley Williams announces Forest Hills Stadium show
item.description: 🎶 Hayley Williams is bringing the vibes to Forest Hills Stadium! Who's ready to dance the night away? 🌟 #HayleyWilliams #LiveMusic
